puzzleDescription: Use a loop to check every character of a String and count how many vowels (a, e, i, o, u) it contains.
objective: Given the String 'text', count the vowels and print the final count. (Note: Assume all letters are lowercase).
hints: Use a for loop: 'for (int i = 0; i < text.length(); i++)'.
Get the current character using 'char c = text.charAt(i);'.
Use an if statement with '||' (OR) to check if 'c' is 'a', 'e', 'i', 'o', or 'u'.
